tasks.a_code:
(set input string $0)
(set len int (len input))
(set result string "")
(for i 0 len
  (set char string (slice input i 1))
  (if (and (in char "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ") (eq (% i 2) 0))
    (set result (join result (upper char)))
    (if (and (in char "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ") (eq (% i 2) 1))
      (set result (join result (lower char)))
      (set result (join result char)))))
(println result)
tasks.b_code:
(set s string $0)
(set out string "")
(set n int (len s))
(for i 0 n
  (set c string (array_get (chars s) i))
  (if (eq (mod i 2) 0)
    (set out (string_concat out (upper c)))
    (else (set out (string_concat out (lower c))))))
(println out)

tasks.a_code:
(set input string $0)
(set result string "")
(set prev char (first input))
(set count int 1)

(for-each ch char (slice input 1)
  (if (eq ch prev)
    (set count (add count 1))
    (begin
      (set result (fmt "{}{}" result prev count))
      (set prev ch)
      (set count 1))))

(set result (fmt "{}{}" result prev count))
(println result)
tasks.b_code:
(set s $0)
(set n (len s))
(if (gt n 0)
  (set chars (chars s))
  (set cur (first chars))
  (set count 1)
  (for i 1 n
    (set ch (array_get chars i))
    (if (eq ch cur)
      (set count (+ count 1))
      (else
        (print (fmt "{}{}" cur count))
        (set cur ch)
        (set count 1))))
  (println (fmt "{}{}" cur count)))

tasks.a_code:
(set num int #0)
(fn digital_root n int -> int
  (if (lt n 10) (ret n))
  (set sum int 0)
  (for-each digit int (split (str n) "")
    (set sum (add sum digit)))
  (ret (digital_root sum)))
(println (digital_root num))
tasks.b_code:
(set n #0)
(while (ge n 10)
  (set s 0)
  (for-each c string (chars (str n))
    (set s (add s (int c))))
  (set n s))
(println n)
tasks.a_stderr: Runtime error: Type mismatch in for-each: variable 'digit' declared as int but got string

tasks.a_code:
(set sentence string $0)
(set letter string $1)
(set words array (split sentence " "))
(set count int 0)
(for-each word string words
  (if (and (gt (len word) 0) (eq (first word) letter))
    (set count (add count 1))))
(println count)
tasks.b_code:

(set letter $1)
(set words (split sentence " "))
(set count 0)
(for-each word words 
  (if (eq (first (chars word)) letter)
    (set count (add count 1))))
(println count)

tasks.a_code:
(set s string $0)
(set char_count map {})
(for-each c string s
  (set count int (if (in c char_count) (get char_count c) 0))
  (set char_count (assoc char_count c (add count 1))))
(set result int -1)
(for-each \(c i) enumerate s
  (when (eq (get char_count c) 1)
    (set result i)
    (break)))
(println result)
tasks.b_code:
(set s $0)
(set char_count (counter (chars s)))
(set result -1)
(for-each i (range 0 (len s))
  (if (eq (get char_count (get (chars s) i)) 1)
    (set result i)
    (break)))
(println result)

tasks.a_code:
(set s string $0)
(set max_depth int 0)
(set current_depth int 0)

(for-each ch string s
  (if (eq ch "(")
    (set current_depth (add current_depth 1))
    (if (eq ch ")")
      (set current_depth (sub current_depth 1))))
  (set max_depth (max max_depth current_depth)))

(println max_depth)
tasks.b_code:
(set s $0)
(set depth 0)
(set max_d 0)
(for-each c (chars s)
  (cond
    ((eq c "(") (set depth (+ depth 1)) (if (> depth max_d) (set max_d depth)))
    ((eq c ")") (set depth (- depth 1)))))
(println max_d)

tasks.a_code:
(set csv string $0)
(set col_name string $1)
(set lines array (split csv "\n"))
(set header array (split (first lines) ","))
(set col_index int (index_of header col_name))
(set values array (map_arr (rest lines) (\line (str_to_int (nth (split line ",") col_index)))))
(set total int (reduce values + 0))
(println total)
tasks.b_code:
(set rows (split $0 "\n"))
(set header (split (first rows) ","))
(set idx (array_index_of header $1))
(println (sum (map_arr (rest rows) (\row (int (get_or (split row ",") idx "0"))))))
